variants.modifierDescription: Eximus units have a much higher spawn rate in this mission. Some of their auras stack.
Enemies have Improved/Added armor. Corrosive Projection effects are halved.
Enemies deal increased Magnetic damage and also have increased Immunity to said damage type.
